author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Result: committed fdee704d on feature/init-bundle-claude-skills (off develop). 24 files changed (+3801 lines): 21 new skill files vendored, build.rs codegen extended, init deploy + manifest tracking wired, integration test added. cargo build green; cargo test --lib (1859 passed); cargo test cli_integration test_init_deploys (3/3 passed); clippy clean on touched files. Smoke-tested init in tmpdir → 21 files in 18 skills land at .claude/skills/<name>/, including rust-gpu-discipline's 4 sibling files. Commit signed with driver key. Ready for user to push, then PR to develop.
